original_prompt: Seamlessly integrated into the provided background scene, occupying the mid-ground, Michio Kaku, a young woman, stands in the left-center of the frame, positioned slightly in front of the man; she is clad in a Manchester United football jersey, black tailored trousers, and accessorized with long dangling earrings. To her right, anchored in the right-center and slightly behind her, is Michael Jordan, an older man, dressed in a terracotta brown jacket, dark blue shirt, and dark denim jeans, holding a Dior Sauvage perfume bottle. The two are closely standing next to each other, locked in an embrace with Michael Jordan's other arm wrapped around Michio Kaku, who looks at him while gently touching his face. This intimate moment is captured with photorealistic subjects, sharp focus on the characters, and a shallow depth of field to emphasize their interaction.
